anatomy_reference_status.reason: No text-free, rights-safe octopus anatomy/circulatory proof image was found that satisfies the gate. Search results were either labeled/text-heavy diagrams, non-preferred share-alike/noncommercial/unclear lanes, generic external octopus photos, or not octopus-heart anatomy. Rebuild should use real octopus plates with agent-created abstract pulse overlays only, not a cutaway/diagram.
hard_reject_rules_applied: fake anatomical cutaway or organ placement presented as literal anatomy
CC BY-SA avoided for this conservative free-lane pass

searches_performed.outcome: No acceptable text-free octopus heart/circulatory anatomy image found.
No acceptable anatomy/proof image found; results were empty, generic octopus photos, or unrelated/unsuitable images.

safe_overlay_alternative.use_source_type: rights-safe real octopus still already in source_rework candidates, pending plate QC
safe_overlay_alternative.overlay_type: agent-created simple abstract pulse-dot/ring overlay only; no labels, no text, no cutaway, no fake organs
safe_overlay_alternative.beat_1_three_hearts: Place exactly three small soft pulse dots/rings on the visible mantle/body area as abstract claim markers, not anatomical organ locations.
safe_overlay_alternative.beat_2_two_gill_hearts: Show exactly two synchronized side/gill-area pulse dots/rings with subtle short flow glows toward the gill region; remove any third marker for this beat.
safe_overlay_alternative.beat_3_one_systemic_heart: Show exactly one central/body pulse dot/ring, followed by a subtle body-wide glow/flow through mantle and arms; do not label it.
safe_overlay_alternative.gate_requirement: Only apply overlays after the real octopus plate passes contact-sheet QC for no source text/watermark/logos, intact anatomy, crop safety, and license/attribution.

next_gate: Build/review contact sheet and verify no watermarks/text/artifacts before any WAYS render.
